title: hedlundia anglica
intro: Hedlundia anglica, also known as English hedlundia, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to England and Wales. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health. Hedlundia anglica can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its roots and leaves in hot water, or in the form of tincture or capsules for easier consumption.
